headlines.description: Midfielder Mikel Merino scored two late goals to keep Arsenal's Premier League title hopes alive with a 2-0 victory at Leicester City on Saturday, after the Spaniard was thrust into a makeshift centre-forward role by his club's injury crisis up front.
headlines.shortLinkText: Merino nets late double as Arsenal down Leicester

headlines.description: A Liam Delap goal helped Ipswich Town overcome a red card for Axel Tuanzebe as they grabbed a 1-1 Premier League draw away to Aston Villa on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa held to frustrating draw by 10-man Ipswich

headlines.description: Fulham put a dent in Nottingham Forest's Premier League top-four aspirations as defender Calvin Bassey's first goal of the season sealed a 2-1 victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Forest suffer top-four blow as Bassey seals Fulham victory

headlines.description: Manchester City's new signing Omar Marmoush bagged a hat trick in 13 first-half minutes in a 4-0 rout of Newcastle United in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marmoush nets hat trick as City blitz Newcastle

headlines.description: Dango Ouattara, Ryan Christie and Marcus Tavernier were all on the scoresheet as Bournemouth comfortably beat struggling Southampton 3-1 at St Mary's Stadium in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bournemouth rise to 5th after easing past Soton

headlines.description: Kevin Schade's early goal gave Brentford a 1-0 win at West Ham United in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Schade's early goal gives Brentford 1-0 win at West Ham

headlines.description: Everton's Premier League revival continued on Saturday as they beat Crystal Palace 2-1 at Selhurst Park thanks to a late winner from Carlos Alcaraz.
headlines.shortLinkText: Carlos Alcaraz snatches late win for Everton against Crystal Palace
